h1.font:
Note:
Another API (or Events) could have a different structure, different object and property names (as already the case with DB model). They would all share the same entity type and property type annotation values.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
